title: African Media Intelligence Authority Philip Odiakose Launches Groundbreaking Book on PR Measurement and Evaluation - FinancialEDGE
description: African Media Intelligence Authority Philip Odiakose Launches Groundbreaking Book on PR Measurement and Evaluation “The Science of Public Relations” offers the ultimate roadmap for data-driven communication performance across Africa and beyond. May 23, 2025 Philip Odiakose, Africa’s leading media intelligence expert and PR measurement authority, today officially launches his much-anticipated book, The Science of Public Relations:
html: African Media Intelligence Authority Philip Odiakose Launches Groundbreaking Book on PR Measurement and Evaluation
